file_insights.purpose: Deliverable spec result with examples and verification
file_insights.changes: Complete replacement with new content documenting 4 implemented CLI UX features: color-coded list output, summary statistics, success messages with hints, and improved error messages. Includes code examples, ANSI color explanations, and testing verification.
file_insights.size_impact: Reduced from 263 lines to 200 lines (more concise with focused content)

file_insights.changes: Added 46 lines documenting subtask-5-2 completion with timestamps, file modifications list, and verification results
Updated subtask-5-1 and subtask-5-2 status from 'pending' to 'completed' with notes and UTC timestamps

patterns_discovered.pattern: ANSI Color Scheme for Terminal States
patterns_discovered.description: Consistent color-coding: blue=pending, amber=running, green=done, red=failed, with dim gray for separators
patterns_discovered.usage_context: CLI list output state group headers

patterns_discovered.description: Single-line aggregation: 'N total · M done · K failed · J pending · avg Xm Ys · success rate Z%'
patterns_discovered.usage_context: Bottom of bop list command output

patterns_discovered.description: Error messages include 'Try:' prefix followed by suggested next command

patterns_discovered.pattern: Success Message with Arrow and Hint
patterns_discovered.description: Format: '✓ Action completed → next suggested action'
patterns_discovered.usage_context: Positive user feedback after operations like bop new, bop clean, bop kill

patterns_discovered.pattern: State Header with Bullet and Count
patterns_discovered.description: Format: '● state-name (count)' with visual separator lines between groups
patterns_discovered.usage_context: Organizing card output by state groups

gotchas_discovered.description: Markdown cannot render actual ANSI colors; documentation must explain what colors represent while showing code with comments
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Included note in result.md: 'The actual terminal output includes ANSI color codes that render as: Blue for pending...'

gotchas_discovered.description: Output in session data shows truncated diff ('... (truncated, 21044 chars total)'), indicating full change was larger than displayed
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Key sections visible; full file verified to exist in filesystem

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Terminal Output Examples vs Actual Rendering
gotchas_discovered.description: Example output in documentation is text-only; actual colors and interactive features not visible in markdown
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Added code blocks with explanations of what ANSI codes will render as

approach_outcome.description: Created output/result.md with before/after examples and feature documentation
deliverables_completed: Comprehensive feature summary covering all 4 CLI improvements
Real output examples showing color-coded states
Success message examples with checkmarks and hints
Error message examples with actionable hints
Testing results verification (91 tests passed, make check passes)

recommendations.recommendation: Add actual before/after screenshots as images rather than just text examples
recommendations.rationale: Task description mentions 'before/after screenshots' which are typically visual assets; text examples are good but images would better demonstrate the color improvements

recommendations.recommendation: Add 'Quick Start' section with step-by-step instructions to see each feature in action
recommendations.rationale: Users may not know how to trigger these features; examples show output but not how to generate it

recommendations.recommendation: Add links to source files (colors.rs, list.rs, etc.) and commit hashes for traceability
recommendations.rationale: Makes it easier for users to find implementation details and verify changes

recommendations.recommendation: Add 'Known Limitations' or 'Future Improvements' section documenting edge cases
recommendations.rationale: Helps set user expectations and documents potential follow-up work

recommendations.recommendation: Consider using HTML comments in markdown to show actual ANSI escape sequences alongside explanations
recommendations.rationale: Would allow future tooling to render actual colors if markdown is processed with ANSI support
